gate_results.log_path: TypeScript / Tests / Lint / Build all exit 0 across domain, application, validators, api (+deps); turbo 19/19 tasks successful.

Every changed line is exercised by a new/updated test: Opportunity.updateName (success/empty/closed/no-event); service updateOpportunity name-persist + empty-name failure; moveStageSchema superRefine (accept/missing/short/non-lost); throwOpportunityCreateError VALIDATION_ERROR->BAD_REQUEST (+ INVALID_OPPORTUNITY_NAME->BAD_REQUEST); pipeline-config assertStageDeactivationAllowed BAD_REQUEST (updateStage+updateAll); mapper + getById closedAt (open/won/lost); list schema key rename + contract tests; probability-forwarded char test. pre-ship diff-coverage (Sonar new_coverage >=80%) PASS.

updateName validates non-empty (trim) BEFORE mutating; wired before applyScalarUpdates in updateOpportunity so a bad name fails before scalar mutation; single save + publish-after-save unchanged. No non-atomic regression (the IFC-271 codex lesson).

B-10: @intelliflow/validators keeps zero framework deps (zod + domain only). validateStageDeactivation still throws a plain Error; the pipeline-config router (HTTP layer) maps it to TRPCError BAD_REQUEST via assertStageDeactivationAllowed. depcruise unaffected (no validators->@trpc/server import).

B-07: opportunityListResponseSchema key data->opportunities matches the live router list response and the frontend (data?.opportunities). The deeper item-shape drift (raw Prisma rows vs DTO) is pre-existing, out of B-07's key-only scope, schema not wired as .output() — tracked (debt-ledger OPP-LIST-SCHEMA-SHAPE-001 + #413).

node scripts/codex-review.mjs -> Verdict PASS, 0 unwaived. Round 1 flagged: getById omitting closedAt (REAL — fixed, B-11 now also covers the detail path + getById tests) and the list item-shape mismatch (pre-existing/out-of-scope — waived 2c5eeef9 with evidence + tracked #413). Round 2 PASS.

kpi_results.kpi: All 7 correctness issues resolved; zero silent data drops
kpi_results.actual: B-04 name persists (domain updateName + service); B-05 verified (probability unwraps to number); B-07 schema key=opportunities; B-09 VALIDATION_ERROR->BAD_REQUEST; B-10 deactivation->BAD_REQUEST (router); B-11 closedAt in list/create/getById responses; B-12 CLOSED_LOST reason required at the schema.
domain 2727 / application 1396 / validators 2375 / api 6167 green; diff-coverage gate PASS (>=80% Sonar new_coverage; changed lines covered).

definition_of_done_items.evidence: Opportunity.updateName + OpportunityService.updateOpportunity wiring; OpportunityService.additional.test 'should persist a name update' + 'should fail an update with an empty name'; Opportunity.test updateName block.
percentageSchema -> Percentage VO; router data.probability?.value -> number; opportunity.router.test 'forwards probability to the service as a plain number, not a VO (B-05)'.
opportunityListResponseSchema key opportunities; opportunity.test 'rejects the legacy data key' + 'accepts the canonical opportunities key'.
throwOpportunityCreateError; opportunity.router.test create BAD_REQUEST tests (account/contact/generic VALIDATION_ERROR).
pipeline-config.router assertStageDeactivationAllowed -> TRPCError BAD_REQUEST; pipeline-config.integration.test deactivation tests assert code BAD_REQUEST.
mapOpportunityToResponse + getById both emit closedAt; mappers.test closedAt block + opportunity.router.test getById closed/open tests + create-merge closedAt:null assertion.
moveStageSchema superRefine; opportunity.test moveStageSchema block + opportunity.router(.additional).test CLOSED_LOST no/short reason -> BAD_REQUEST.
diff-coverage gate PASS; full suites green across domain/application/validators/api.

notes:
IFC-282 Deal Router Correctness Fixes — remediates docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md section 6 (B-04, B-05, B-07, B-09, B-10, B-11, B-12; exactly the 7 assigned to IFC-282 in the audit Priority-Fixes table) on a worktree branched from origin/main@9c438badc.

B-04: name updates were silently dropped (service TODO + no domain updateName). Added Opportunity.updateName (Result<void,DomainError>, non-empty trim guard via new InvalidOpportunityNameError, NO closed-guard — name is metadata like updateDescription, so renaming a closed deal is allowed; no domain event, consistent with updateDescription). Wired in OpportunityService.updateOpportunity BEFORE applyScalarUpdates (validate-then-mutate). The router update error mapper now maps INVALID_OPPORTUNITY_NAME -> BAD_REQUEST (defence-in-depth behind Zod min(1)).

B-05: verified-only — percentageSchema yields a Percentage VO, so the router's data.probability?.value already unwraps to a number; added a forwarding characterisation test (no source change).

B-07: opportunityListResponseSchema key data -> opportunities, matching the router list response + frontend (data?.opportunities).

B-09: throwOpportunityCreateError now maps NOT_FOUND_ERROR -> 404 and everything else (VALIDATION_ERROR from a bad account/contact FK + domain errors) -> BAD_REQUEST.

B-10: validateStageDeactivation stays in the framework-free validators package (throws plain Error); the pipeline-config router maps it to TRPCError BAD_REQUEST via assertStageDeactivationAllowed (HTTP-status mapping belongs in the HTTP layer, not in @intelliflow/validators which has only zod+domain deps). Deliberate, documented deviation from the literal 'validateStageDeactivation throws TRPCError' wording.

B-11: mapOpportunityToResponse + the create-merge mock + the getById detail response all now emit closedAt (set by markAsWon/markAsLost, cleared by reopen).

B-12: moveStageSchema.superRefine requires a loss reason (min 10) for CLOSED_LOST at the input boundary (BAD_REQUEST) instead of failing deep in the service.

Validation: 4/4 (TypeScript, Tests, Lint, Build) green on domain/application/validators/api. Tests: domain 2727, application 1396, validators 2375, api 6167 (2 pre-existing skips). Diff-coverage gate PASS. Codex semantic review PASS (caught the real getById-closedAt omission, fixed; waived 1 pre-existing/out-of-scope list-schema item-shape finding with evidence). Container/context wiring verified unchanged (OpportunityService container.ts:521, context.ts:43-55,192-194 — IFC-282 adds a domain method + wires it in the existing service; no new service).

OUT-OF-SCOPE FINDING TRACKED (project Rule 8): opportunityListResponseSchema item shape (opportunityResponseSchema) does not match the router's raw Prisma list rows. Latent (schema not wired as .output(); the deeper fix is owned by a dedicated modelling task). Tracked: debt-ledger OPP-LIST-SCHEMA-SHAPE-001 + gh issue #413. The audit's other section-6 findings (B-06/B-08/B-15 -> IFC-284; B-13/B-14 -> IFC-285) are owned by other tasks, not dropped.
